item.title: Alone at the office today
item.description: We’ve started to return to our offices, but I was the only of my colleagues in today and one of like five people in the building, so I did the only reasonable thing: reenact the Pablo Escobar waiting meme.
item.dc:creator: GabbiTheSwedishNerdGirl

item.title: Dino tattoo RIP little man
item.description:
Long time lurking
My little guy passed away two weeks ago with heart complications

item.title: Day 280: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: The Chophouse Brisket & Bacon Patty, Roasted Cremini And Oyster Mushrooms, Blue Cheese, Crispy Onions, Horseradish Aioli, On A Brioche Bun From Walker’s Tap & Table In Glenwood, MD Previous Day 279: https://imgur.com/gallery/HZM4kiT MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.title: I don't know what to do and I'm sorry
item.description:
I know that Ukrainians are literally dying right now, the cities are being bombed for no fucking reason but if I don't vent right now I'm seriously gonna loose my mind.
The post uploaded in incorrect order for some reason. The confession bear and description under it should be the last segment. I'm on the verge of loosing my mind. I can't spread info on social media as the new law of spreading "misinformation" has passed recently which can get you up to 15 years of jail time. Anti-war protestors are a minority now because most people are scared. Those few who do protest are arrested immediately. If you carry any banner, any smallest sign of protest like a green ribbon or you look slightly suspicios you get put inside a prison bus. Police won't let you use your phone anymore to call your close ones or even a lawyer. Lawyers are not being let into the police stations where the arrested are held against all laws and constitutional rights. Police make you go through fingerprinting under threats that they'll break your fingers although you have every right not to do that if your identity was verified by passport. There are talks about imposing marital law here right now. If that happens everyone is risking their lives having sone "fake" information on their phone or for decline of unblocking it. I can't leave the country now, I won't be able to travel abroad because of all the anti-russian sentiments that are happening in the world right now. Travelling is a big IF because the country may turn into North Korea. If I ever get drafted into the war zone I will desert as soon as possible, given that I won't get shot or bombed beforehand. And I realize that my concerns are bullshit compared to the Ukrainians' who already lost their loved ones or even their children. I have no idea about how it feels to loose your child to bombings, I've never had kids. I DON'T KNOW WHAT KIND OF DEVILISH MUSH IS IN PLACE OF BRAINS OF THOSE WHO ORDER TO BOMB THE CITIES!! I don't know if I can ask for this right now but please don't blame and hate all Russians in what's happening. Putin has so much control over media that most Russians are just his marionettes. Thank you for reading. TL:DR - see memes.
Our relationship was always abusive from his side. Constant verbal abuse and criticism about how he always claims that he was not ready to be a father at the time and I was concieved by accident. I still didn't want to cut ties with him all this time, even though my therapist told me it would be better for my mental health. But I still couldn't as I am his only son and I would feel utter guilt for doing so. He claims to be ultra-patriotic because he knows Russia's history so well and works hard for preserving it's legacy. It even looked like he was happy about the war, making excuses that the whole Ukraine consists of nazis which opress Russian-speaking part of the population. He looks at war from the perspective of higher ranks and strategy. He doesn't care about individual people's lives, he just sees soldiers and people as pieces on a chessboard. Although he's never ever fought in any war or conflict. So right after I set foot in his apartment we started to talk about the war. After I learned that he was pro-war I realized there was no reason to argue with him further cause all I hear are the same old arguments about the Russia's safety against NATO block etc. etc. I asked him one question: would he go to war and fight right now. He said yes and at that moment I left. Even before the water in the kettle set for tea boiled. My mom is unfortunately also brainwashed because she only gets news from TV which is totally controlled by the government. She's not as thickskulled as father which makes it easier to get some common sence in her head but still very hard. Funny thing is she's always been supportive of Putin even more than my father has been. But now every time I send her the real videos from the front line she's just saying that there are a lot of fakes on the internet. Like WAKE UP MOM, WHO WOULD BUILD A FAKE KIYV OR KHARKIV TO BOMB IT FOR FAKE VIDEOS, WHAT THE FUCK???? WAKE THE FUCK UP!!!
Yesterday I went to work and I had to speak with the Polish partners of our company and present the sample we made as I happen to be the only one in 300 employees company who speaks English decently. Beforehand I wrote a letter to the person I spoke with that I condemn the actions of our government and I'm sorry for what's happening. I just had to eliminate the potential awkwardness in our conversation because I know the world don't look the same at Russians anymore, regardless of the fact that they are not directly responsible for what's happening. While I was in the production complex I was devastated by the pro-war anti-western mindset of the vast majority of workers there. Everyone was joking about implemented sanctions, pouring the verbal shit on the Ukrainians and Westerners. Even my project manager who I thought was smart enough happened to be ignorant about the cause of war. It feels like about 60% of Russians are misinformed an brainwashed. Another dissapointment was my therapist. I told her about the anxiety I am feeling right now because of the war and our conversation grew into a political discussion. The talk was calm though but I just realized even more about the ignorance of the majority of Russians. My only true allies right now are my small circle of friends and my GF as we all share the same adequate mindset about what's happening. Edit: Thank you all so much for the support! I honestly didn't expect this many positive and supportive comments under this post! It's exactly what I need during these times. Fuck Putin!
item.dc:creator: PraiseTheMachineGod

item.title: Finland to step down military spending
item.description: Not trying to downplay the current crisis in any way, but this managed to put a smile on my face just for a little while amidst all the doomscrolling. I hope it does the same for someone else too. Stay strong Ukraine. Fuck that disgusting piece of shit Putin. He will go down in history alright, probably not in the way he wanted though.

item.title: Elon Musk's Starlink terminals are in Ukraine
item.description: Elon Musk said that Starlink's satellite broadband service is available in Ukraine and SpaceX is sending more terminals to the country, whose internet has been disrupted due to the Russian invasion, Reuters reported. (https://www.reuters.com/technology/musk-says-starlink-active-ukraine-russian-invasion-disrupts-internet-2022-02-27/)
item.dc:creator: ImpatientMoth

item.title: Russia plans public executions for Ukrainian Civilians who protest
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SimW5xKxKGw Dear Russian Soldiers, if you didn't realize you were the bad guys before, you should realize it now. Adopting the tactics of Hitler and Stalin are never a good idea. #GloryToUkraine

item.dc:creator: CWCat

item.title: Florida youths standing up for their rights.
item.description:
Florida senate is about to pass HB 1557 “Don’t Say Gay” legislation that will knock LGBTQ progress back 100 years. I’m devastated that Gov DeSatan would allow this bullsh*t, but I couldn’t be more proud of all the students who walked out in solidarity of their friends and classmates to protest this ridiculous legislation. #FreeToSayGay #LGBTQ #FuckDeSantis MOST VIRAL UPDATE: as @NerdNerdburger points out, the spitfire that started this walk out, has been suspended from school, indefinitely. I hope he uses that suspension to rally even more youth to stand up for LGBTQ kids and to get that colossal ass-hat DeSantis out of office!!! Here’s the link to the article @NerdNerdburger mentions. https://www.news4jax.com/news/florida/2022/03/04/student-organizer-of-dont-say-gay-school-walk-outs-suspended/
Representative Michele Rayner
Representative Carlos Guillermo Smith pt1
Rep CGS pt 2

item.title: 5 million Rubles
item.description: When a Russian soldier surrenders and says the word million they will be granted asylum and 5 million Rubles. Edit: here is a link to the defense of Ukraine's Twitter: https://mobile.twitter.com/DefenceU/status/1498359087184109572 Here is a link to the Minister of Defense of Ukraine's Facebook post about this topic: https://m.facebook.com/100063790800238/posts/357824103020614/?d=n

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Curve ball from my favorite workplace proximity associate
item.description: Apparently we can't be just friends anymore, I never saw this coming...she hid it pretty well. I never thought of her like that (I've been really going through it with my ex the last year or so), but she's so funny, smart, pretty, an amazing artist, a nerd who likes comics, best worker in the place.... we already know each other inside and out, and despite my flaws and bad habits, she still makes me feel so great. Ive turned down so many girls at work because " I can't dip the pen in company ink" but golly, as a hopeless romantic, she's really making me wanna dip in her ink.
item.dc:creator: Whorville
